prompt:
Turn this into an interactive flow diagram:

```mermaid
flowchart LR
    A([Start]) --> B[Search Products]
    B --> C{Found results?}
    C -->|Yes| D[Product Detail]
    C -->|No| E[No Results Page]
    E --> B
    D --> F{In Stock?}
    F -->|Yes| G[Add to Cart]
    F -->|No| H[Notify When Available]
    G --> I[Checkout]
    I --> J([Order Confirmed])
```
expected_output: A standalone HTML file converting the Mermaid diagram into an interactive D3 visualization with proper node types (start/end as pills, decisions as diamonds, screens as rectangles). Figma-matched node colors on warm canvas.
